case_number: Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. D-24 of 2023

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Special Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. D-24 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For fresh case. 1. For orders on office objections at Flag ‘A’. 2. For orders on M.A No.668/2023 3. For hearing of main case. 02.11.2023. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. -.-.-.-. This is an appeal filed by the State against the Judgment dated 02.12.2022 passed by learned 1st Additional Sessions/Special Judge (CNS) Naushehro Feroze in Special case No. 96 of 2022 whereby accused Zulifqar Ali (respondent) has been acquitted on the charge under Section 9 (c) CNS Act, 1997. At the time of presentation of this appeal, office has raised various objections as to maintainability of this appeal which appears to be time barred by 41 days. Besides an application under Section 5 of Limitation Act, 1908 seeking condonation of delay has been filed. Even today learned Additional P.G is unable to offer any explanation on that score. Under the circumstances, application under Section 5 of Limitation Act, 1908 stands dismissed with the result Criminal Acquittal Appeal also stands dismissed as well, being time barred. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
